name: Project 01 - Real RevOps Lead Intake, OpenRouter Scoring, Approval, CRM Storage

parameters.content: Real Integration Mode skeleton. Uses Google Sheets intake from Google Forms, OpenRouter structured scoring, PostgreSQL CRM storage, Gmail human approval, Calendar scheduling, and validation/error logging. Credentials and IDs are placeholders.

nodes.name: Google Sheets Trigger - Form Lead Added
Code - Validate Consent And Required Fields
IF - Consent And Required Fields Valid

parameters.query: INSERT INTO workflow_errors (n8n_execution_id, workflow_name, node_name, severity, error_message, payload_reference) VALUES ('{{$execution.id}}', 'Project 01 - RevOps', 'Code - Validate Consent And Required Fields', 'warning', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.validation_errors) }}', '{{ $json.source_record_id }}');

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: $env.OPENROUTER_MODEL, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You are a RevOps analyst. Return strict JSON only with score, tier, reasons, risk_flags, recommended_next_action, follow_up_email_subject, follow_up_email_body.' }, { role: 'user', content: JSON.stringify($json) } ], response_format: { type: 'json_object' } } }}

nodes.name: OpenRouter - Score Lead With Structured JSON

parameters.query: INSERT INTO crm_leads (source_record_id, full_name, work_email, company_name, website, industry, company_size, monthly_revenue, country, pain_points, hours_lost_per_week, tools_used, budget, timeline, decision_authority, desired_outcome, consent, lead_score, lead_tier, ai_summary, recommended_next_action, status, prompt_version, model_name) VALUES ('{{$json.source_record_id}}', '{{$json.full_name}}', '{{$json.work_email}}', '{{$json.company_name}}', '{{$json.website}}', '{{$json.industry}}', '{{$json.company_size}}', NULLIF('{{$json.monthly_revenue}}','')::numeric, '{{$json.country}}', '{{$json.pain_points}}', NULLIF('{{$json.hours_lost_per_week}}','')::numeric, '{{$json.tools_used}}', NULLIF('{{$json.budget}}','')::numeric, '{{$json.timeline}}', '{{$json.decision_authority}}', '{{$json.desired_outcome}}', TRUE, {{$json.lead_score}}, '{{$json.lead_tier}}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.score_reasons) }}', '{{$json.recommended_next_action}}', 'scored', '{{$json.prompt_version}}', '{{$json.model_name}}') ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING RETURNING id;

nodes.name: Postgres - Upsert Scored Lead In CRM
IF - Hot Lead Requires Same-Day Approval

parameters.subject: ={{ 'Approve follow-up for ' + $('Code - Validate OpenRouter JSON Output').first().json.company_name }}

nodes.name: Gmail - Human Approval For Lead Follow-Up

additionalFields.summary: ={{ 'Discovery call hold - ' + $('Code - Validate OpenRouter JSON Output').first().json.company_name }}

nodes.name: Google Calendar - Create Tentative Discovery Hold

parameters.query: INSERT INTO approval_tasks (source_type, approver_email, approval_payload) VALUES ('lead_follow_up', '{{$env.REVOPS_MANAGER_EMAIL}}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json) }}'::jsonb);

nodes.name: Schedule Trigger - Daily RevOps Manager Report

parameters.query: SELECT lead_tier, COUNT(*) AS lead_count, SUM(COALESCE(monthly_revenue,0)) AS represented_revenue FROM crm_leads WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day' GROUP BY lead_tier ORDER BY lead_tier;
